name: Peanut Butter Pie Michael Cook
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the peanut butter, cream cheese, powdered sugar, and half of the Cool Whip together until well combined.
2. Pour into prepared Graham cracker crust.
3. Top with remaining Cool Whip.
4. Sprinkle crushed peanuts on top.
5. Chill in refrigerator.
